    feat(mcp): Finalize v24 Proxy Architecture and 35-case Evaluation Suite
    
    - Ported ROI-optimized pruning logic to the evaluation suite.
    - Synced Relational Audit Schema (Header/Detail/Footer) to production proxy.
    - Hardened Thompson NFA security rules for destructive shell commands.
    - Established 94% accuracy baseline across 35 technical test cases.
